class.name: android_sensor_viz/AndroidImuPanel
class.description: Displays Android IMU (sensor_msgs/msg/Imu) messages in RViz2.

class.name: android_sensor_viz/AndroidGnssPanel
class.description: Displays Android GNSS (NavSatFix) messages in RViz2.

class.name: android_sensor_viz/AndroidCameraPanel
class.description: Displays Android Camera (sensor_msgs/msg/CompressedImage) metadata in RViz2.

class.name: android_sensor_viz/AndroidDashboardPanel
class.description: Unified Android sensor dashboard showing all sensor data (IMU compass, GNSS, camera preview, battery, magnetometer, barometer) in a single RViz2 panel.
